title: Narrow bee-exploring (load a parked brief when present, D9) and wire bee-hive routing for bee-qualifying -- additive, no default-path change (owner decision 2026-07-23)
action: Per owner decision (2026-07-23, chosen over D1's literal 'bee-exploring only runs on parked items' wording -- that literal reading would break the default entry path for every feature not yet touched by bee-qualifying, since D12 defers its auto-trigger): (1) skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 1 gains a 'Brief check (D9)' bullet -- if CONTEXT.md already holds a bee-qualifying park brief (Outstanding Questions, written via bee-context-locking park mode), load it instead of a fresh quick-scout and flip Status parked->in-flight once resolved; step 3 gains a matching note to draw gray-area candidates from the loaded brief instead of re-scouting. No brief present -> behavior unchanged from today. (2) skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md routing table gains ONE new row for the explicit backlog-triage pipeline invocation -> bee-qualifying, added directly under the existing 'Vague or new feature -> bee-exploring' row, which is NOT modified.

truths: bee-exploring's existing Flow step numbering (0-6) is unchanged -- additive bullets only, no renumbering
bee-exploring's Brief-check bullet is additive: a feature with no park brief scopes/scouts exactly as before
bee-hive's routing table keeps the 'Vague or new feature -> bee-exploring' row byte-unchanged; the new bee-qualifying row is a separate addition
Both edits reference the correct D-IDs (D9 for the brief check, D12 for the routing row's trigger-deferred framing)
Rendered .claude/skills/bee-exploring, .agents/skills/bee-exploring, .claude/skills/bee-hive, .agents/skills/bee-hive all carry the new content via the onboarding sync
prohibitions: Do not change the 'Vague or new feature -> bee-exploring' routing row
Do not restrict bee-exploring's default (no-brief) path in any way
Do not build the automated backlog-row trigger itself -- explicitly deferred, D12

verify: grep -q 'Brief check (D9' skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Vague or new feature | `bee-exploring`' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md && grep -q 'bee-qualifying' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Brief check (D9' .claude/skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q 'bee-qualifying' .claude/skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md

trace.outcome: Added brief-check branch to bee-exploring (D9) and one new routing row to bee-hive for bee-qualifying, both additive, default paths unchanged
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":["skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md and skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md diffed against their pre-cell HEAD versions"],"red_failure_evidence":"Before this cell, bee-exploring had no Brief-check bullet at all -- git diff shows 6 insertions/2 deletions on bee-exploring/SKILL.md (the 2 deletions are the old Backlog-flip bullet text and the old quick-scout intro line, both rewrapped to reference the new bullet, not removed content). Before this cell, bee-hive routing table had 28 rows with no bee-qualifying entry (git diff shows exactly 1 insertion on bee-hive/SKILL.md, the new row). Confirmed via git diff --stat: 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-) total.","verification_run":"Additive edits per owner decision 2026-07-23 (safe interpretation chosen over D1s literal wording -- see cell action). Existing Vague-or-new-feature routing row and bee-exploring default no-brief path left byte-unchanged; verified by grep asserting the exact original row text still exists post-edit.","verify_output":"VERIFY_PASS across both source files and both rendered projections (.claude/skills/bee-exploring, .claude/skills/bee-hive)."}
trace.verify_command: grep -q 'Brief check (D9' skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Vague or new feature' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md && grep -q bee-qualifying skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Brief check (D9' .claude/skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q bee-qualifying .claude/skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md
